summary: Flash attention via kernel_lib helpers. Compute: matmul_block(QK^T transpose, num_k_blocks=1) -> reduce MAX ROW -> BinaryMax running-max -> sub/scale/exp chain (Col bcast) -> reduce SUM ROW -> matmul_block PV -> two-op rescale of prior l,O (no L1-acc, no runtime ping-pong: templated step fn on parity). Reader: Q held, K read grid-transposed, V natural, scalers x2 (MAX+SUM pool-aware). Work split B*Hq*q_num_chunks via split_work_to_cores. Chunk sizes derived as largest divisor of Sqt/Skvt <= knob to avoid partial chunks.

detail: acceptance test 32/32 pass in both --dev and production mode (no race). Debug file 4/4 pass. Flash attention online-softmax via kernel_lib helpers; multi-core split over B*Hq*q_num_chunks.

summary: Eliminated A/B ping-pong: running (m,l,O) held in fixed CBs updated in place (read old via HeldBulk, pop, push new). Single kv_step instantiation (no parity template, no constexpr-K unroll) fits kernel-config buffer for long sequences. k_num_chunks moved to RT. Now passes 4096-seq (64 KV chunks) and 48-core golden shapes plus acceptance 32/32 dev+prod.

root_cause: R1 widened intermediate CBs to fp32 when fp32_dest_acc_en=True, doubling L1 on the bf16@True Phase-0 baseline path and OOMing prior-passing D=256 bf16 cells
fix: interm_df = float32 if in_df==float32 else bfloat16 (couple fp32 intermediates to float32 input, not the DEST-acc flag)
result: regression fixed; 32 residual failures are large-D L1 OOM = Refinement 2 scope

detail: golden 1061 passed/0 failed/848 xfailed; all 32 OOM cells fixed; PCC>=0.99961
lever: L1-budget cap on sq_chunk_t/sk_chunk_t via exact measured footprint model

conclusion: DRAM-read-bound, big headroom; B*H=10==grid.y -> clean PerRow mcast, one head per row, 11 cols split 74 Q-blocks, injector col0

finding: ~10x fewer DRAM K/V reads -> FLAT. Shape not DRAM-read-bound as hypothesized; injector re-streams KV rounds(7)x serially, and/or compute/dataflow-latency bound. correct scheme-change, no win yet.

conclusion: injector DRAM read NOT critical path; shape NOT read-bound. Bottleneck = compute/dataflow latency -> Refinement 5 compute-amortization is the real lever, not read-strategy.

note: compute-side amortization: coarsen k_chunk (safe, no grid impact) primary; q_chunk with grid-fill guard secondary. Raise Q/K_CHUNK_TILES caps; existing _pick_chunks + L1 budget keep it DRY and large-D safe. Measure (4,4) baseline vs coarsened on flagged (1,10,9472,128) bf16 fp32acc=False.

levers.matmul_subblock: already at DEST ceiling 8 tiles, no headroom
levers.kv_buffer: depth3=10.29ms no gain, reads off critical path, parked at 2

util: ~0.14->~0.15, 0.35 floor NOT reached — residual is FPU/SFPU phase serialization (scheme-change), out of block-knob scope

conclusion: FPU/SFPU overlap premise refuted: FPU only 19% of wall, ceiling 1.24x, concurrency architecturally unavailable on single MATH thread
